rationale_source: F2.AC state transition (R10-C-1): LTV >80% triggers workflow_state transition from active → awaiting_collateral

workflow_state.rationale: LTV 82% (>80%) + no collateral_offered triggers F2.AC state transition per R10-C-1 architectural intent.

must_include.rationale: F4.HL dedicated generator must ask about collateral (R10-C-1).

outbound_emails.rationale: Standard prelim path BYPASSED in favor of F4.HL dedicated collateral-ask path per R10-C-1 dedicated-generator-bypass discipline.
